boundaries.title_guess: France 2017: Provence/Burgundy return (Dombes Abbey, St. Jean de Vaux)

evidence.excerpt: On to have lunch near alot of lakes at Dombes Abbey... We shopped - for England... + reached St. Jean de Vaux.
"Thursday May 11" ... we bought 60 bottles of Cremant de Bourgogne

boundaries.notes: Window opens mid-trip; this is the tail end of a 2017 France trip already in progress in the previous window (book4). Reported as a start only because it is the first visible content; the real boundary lies before this window.

evidence.excerpt: reached Westfield Rd at 6.30. A super, long holiday. __June 2nd Friday__ 8.45. Conrad, Eleni, Tinder, Simon & I set off for Telford... On to Berrington Hall NT

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0291_L: the France 2017 trip ENDS at 'reached Westfield Rd at 6.30. A super, long holiday.' (return home); the Hay Festival trip STARTS at the '__June 2nd Friday__' heading.

evidence.excerpt: Then home. __Friday July 28th__ __Bromyard__ Eve drove red jazz to farm... Charles' + Jenny's wedding at Belmont Abbey.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0292_R: the Hay trip ENDS at 'We had coffee, tea... Then home.' (after Sunday June 4th); the Bromyard/Belmont wedding trip STARTS at '__Friday July 28th__ Bromyard'.

evidence.excerpt: drove home to take the Mitchcocks to St. George's. __Friday August 4th__ 8 am we set off to the factory... On to NE of Norwich... Reached Seamark after 5 pm.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0293_L: the Bromyard wedding trip ENDS at 'Bryony gave us lunch & we drove home' (Sunday); the Norwich/Seamark trip STARTS at '__Friday August 4th__'.

evidence.excerpt: Hamburgers on the way home... Home at 10. __Wed 16th Aug__ Simon, Eve, Tinder left 86 at 10. Off to farm & then camping with John & Kay to celebrate John's 30th birthday
On to __Greenacres__ campsite near Compton Martin... John & Kaz arrived in time for supper.
__Saturday__ John's 30th birthday

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0293_R: the Norwich/Seamark trip ENDS at 'Hamburgers on the way home... Home at 10.'; the farm/Greenacres (John's 30th) trip STARTS at '__Wed 16th Aug__'. Trip runs through B_0294 (Axbridge) and B_0295 (Greenacres, Compton Martin).

boundaries.title_guess: Short autumn outing via Alcester (supper with Charles & Jenny)

evidence.excerpt: stopping off with papers for the Chad accountant at Alcester on the way home. __Monday October 16th__ Eve caught an Uber to Chad, cleared the loo & we set off for supper with Charles & Jenny.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0296_L: the previous (John's 30th/Greenacres) trip ENDS at '...on the way home.'; a new short outing STARTS at '__Monday October 16th__'. B_0296_R is blank.

boundaries.title_guess: End-of-book reference notes & folding/craft sketches (Cluny cake box, Lake Orta/Mont Blanc cafes)

evidence.excerpt: x 2 / fold / front / this flap only on one... cake box from Cluny
Recommended place to go for a coffee near Lake Orta... Ski lift right next to Restaurant Zerotta near Mont Blanc

boundaries.notes: Loose sketch/notes pages and a blank (B_0299_R) at the back of book4. Not a van trip; reference/craft material.

boundaries.title_guess: New volume front matter + index (book5: 'Camping van log April 13th 2018 - June 25th 2022')

evidence.excerpt: Camping van log April 13th 2018 – June 25th 2022 ... Simon + Eve Kirby, 86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston B15 3JG
[index_page] 1 Rosson Wye / Caerleon / 5 Penn On Cardiff...
[index_page] 55 St. Melangel's Church... 72 Pian del Voglio

boundaries.notes: New notebook begins here. B_0300_R is the title/ownership page; B_0301-B_0302 are the handwritten index for book5 (years 2018-2022 with 2021/2022 markers). B_0300_L is a Canterbury Cathedral photo caption belonging to the close of book4.

boundaries.title_guess: Wales: Ross-on-Wye, Caerleon, Penn Onn / St Fagans (John & Kay's new house)

evidence.excerpt: April 13th 2018 Simon, Eve & Tinder left for Wales to visit John & Kag in their new house (11am)... On to Caerleon... White House Farm
__Saturday April 14th__ ...arrived at Penn Onn at 10.15

boundaries.notes: First trip of book5. B_0303_L is a Caerleon photo caption.

boundaries.title_guess: Kent & France: Ightham Mote/Stalisfield, Loire (Beaugency, David at Treignac), Tournon/Tournus, St. Jean de Vaux, Canterbury & London

evidence.excerpt: raced home... to get to church. __Thursday May 3rd__ We set off at 9, voted (Newman House)... dropped off Tinder... on to Ightham Mote... the Plough Inn Stalisfield
We got to the Tunnel an hour early... camping beyond Dreux at a Municipal Park at St. Remysur l'Avre.
We called in for a pub lunch with Judith & Rosemary on the way to Kennels. Then home

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0305_L: the Wales/Penn Onn trip ENDS at the Sunday paragraph 'we... raced home... to get there with 10 minutes to spare to get to church.'; the long Kent+France trip STARTS at '__Thursday May 3rd__'. This trip runs B_0305 through B_0312_R (ends 'Then home', ~May 22nd).

boundaries.title_guess: Herefordshire: Bromyard, Eardisland, Burton Hall, Shobdon, Croft Castle

evidence.excerpt: Thursday May 31st. 5.15. We set off for the farm... We stopped in Bromyard + went on to __Eardisland__.
__Croft Castle__ ...the Iron Age hill fort.

boundaries.notes: Preceding boundary (B_0312_R) already returned home, so this opens cleanly. Trip runs through B_0314_L (June 3rd Sunday, returning home).

evidence.excerpt: __August 4th, Saturday__ At 9 Simon, Eve & Tinder left for Hattie's & Ramsey's wedding at Farnham... took the scenic routes. Heavy traffic for part of the way back.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0314_R contains TWO trip starts. First the brief Farnham wedding trip (Aug 4) which begins and returns home within the first paragraph; then the Rhayader/Elan Valley trip STARTS at '__Wed Aug 16th__'.

boundaries.title_guess: Rhayader & Elan Valley (Wyside Club Site, via Brook House Farm)

evidence.excerpt: __Wed Aug 16th__ We left at 12.45. & went to Brook House Farm... On to Rhayader in the middle of Wales. We are camped at __Wyside Club Site__
We drove up to the 3rd lake in the Elan Valley

boundaries.notes: Second start on B_0314_R. Trip runs through B_0315 (Thursday/Friday/Saturday at Rhayader).

evidence.excerpt: Aug 26th Saturday~~ Sunday Simon & Eve at farm for hop-picking. Parked in courtyard. Came home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0315_R: the Rhayader/Elan Valley trip ENDS at '...on the way to the farm now to pick up the smalls & keep them at 86 until Tuesday.'; a short farm hop-picking trip STARTS at 'Aug 26th'. Very brief entry.
boundaries.notes: Could be read as a continuation/coda of the Rhayader trip rather than a separate van outing; entry is one line. Low confidence.

evidence.excerpt: Friday 28th Sept 4 pm Simon, Eve, Tinder → __Dornston__. Campsite... Sat 29th... lunch + home.

boundaries.notes: Dornston/Dormston matches book5 index p16. Trip is Sept 28-29 2018, returning home.

boundaries.title_guess: Barnsley / Newark Park (Ashen Mains campsite, with Charles)

evidence.excerpt: April 5th 2019 Simon, Eve + Tinder come to near Barnsley. Arrived 5:30.
Newark Park, Gloucs ... Ashen Mains campsite.
__April 6th__ ...We drove to Newark Park.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0316_L: the Dornston trip ENDS at 'lunch + home.'; the Barnsley/Newark Park trip STARTS at 'April 5th 2019' (a ~6-month date jump). Trip runs B_0316 through B_0318_L.

boundaries.title_guess: Northampton: 78 Derngate (Mackintosh house), via Bierton & Bicester

evidence.excerpt: Then on to home. Sunday April 28th We shd have left at 8.30... booked into a 10.30. tour of Dern Gate, Mackintosh's house in Northampton.
On the way home we stopped with Judith Kirby for lunch at Bierton, then had tea on the roadside... near Bicester.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0318_L: the Newark Park/April 2019 trip ENDS at 'Frampton on Severn... Then on to home.'; the Derngate/Northampton trip STARTS at 'Sunday April 28th'. This trip closes at the end of the window (B_0318_R, returns home).

notes: Window straddles two notebooks: it covers the closing trips of book4 (2017, page nos ~108-116; B_0289-B_0296 plus loose sketch/notes pages B_0297-B_0299) and the opening of book5 ('Camping van log April 13th 2018 - June 25th 2022', title page B_0300_R, index B_0301-B_0302, narrative from B_0303_R). Physical page numbers in the 2017 section are scrambled by scan order (109,118,112,113,114,116) but the dated narrative is continuous; boundaries are reported in spread order. The Derngate trip at B_0318 returns home before the window edge, so nothing is left open.
